Overview

Introduction Token System Setup agents.md

Components

Button Dialog Sheet Card Accordion Tabs Dropdown Toast Combobox Toggle

shadcn-html / card

No JS

Card

Content container with header, body, and footer regions. Use <div> for layout grouping or <article> for standalone content.

Notifications

Manage your notification preferences.

Push Notifications

Device alerts

Email Digest

Daily summary

SMS Alerts

Critical only

Total Revenue

$45,231

+20.1% from last month

Active Users

+2,350

+180 since last hour

Modern Design

Exploring minimal aesthetics through form and color.

A deep dive into the principles that guide contemporary visual design. Less is more when every detail is intentional.

Team Members

Manage who has access to this project.

Cody Lindley

Owner

JD

Jane Doe

Editor

AS

Alex Smith

Viewer

patterns/card.md

Structure

.cardhost — div or article .card-headertitle + description, padding 1.5rem (no bottom) .card-titleheading, 1.125rem, weight 600 .card-description--muted-foreground, 0.875rem .card-contentbody, padding 1.5rem all sides .card-footerflex row, padding 1.5rem (no top)

Token usage

Surface → --card

Text → --card-foreground

Border → --border

Composition patterns

Image cardPlace <img> as first child (overflow:hidden on .card handles rounding) Header actionflex-direction:row on .card-header, action button in slot Metric cardHeader-only layout with icon + large stat value

Element choice

• <div> — UI grouping, forms, settings panels

• <article> — standalone content (blog post, product listing)

<!-- Standard card -->
<div class="card">
  <div class="card-header">
    <h3 class="card-title">Card Title</h3>
    <p class="card-description">Supporting text.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="card-content">
    <!-- body content -->
  </div>
  <div class="card-footer">
    <button class="btn" data-variant="outline">Cancel</button>
    <button class="btn" data-variant="default">Save</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Image card (article for standalone content) -->
<article class="card">
  <img src="..." alt="..." style="width:100%;aspect-ratio:16/9;object-fit:cover;display:block;">
  <div class="card-header">
    <h3 class="card-title">Title</h3>
    <p class="card-description">Description</p>
  </div>
  <div class="card-content" style="padding-top:0;">
    <p>Body text...</p>
  </div>
  <div class="card-footer">
    <button class="btn" data-variant="default" data-size="sm">Read more</button>
  </div>
</article>

<!-- Header action card -->
<div class="card">
  <div class="card-header" style="flex-direction:row;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;">
    <div>
      <h3 class="card-title">Title</h3>
      <p class="card-description">Description</p>
    </div>
    <button class="btn" data-variant="ghost" data-size="icon" aria-label="More">
      <svg aria-hidden="true">...</svg>
    </button>
  </div>
  <div class="card-content">...</div>
</div>

<!-- Metric card (compact) -->
<div class="card">
  <div class="card-header"
       style="flex-direction:row;align-items:center;
              justify-content:space-between;padding-bottom:0.5rem;">
    <p class="card-description" style="font-weight:500;">Revenue</p>
    <svg aria-hidden="true">...</svg>
  </div>
  <div class="card-content" style="padding-top:0.25rem;">
    <p style="font-size:1.75rem;font-weight:700;">$45,231</p>
    <p class="card-description">+20.1% from last month</p>
  </div>
</div>
